sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29462" key="duspro/smeiktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσπρόσ-μεικτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to get into</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λιμήν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.101</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
